# Getting help with agenthook

Pick the channel that fits — it keeps answers searchable for the next person.

- 💬 **Questions, setup help, "does it work with my tracker?"** →
  [Discussions › Q&A](https://github.com/Jesuso/agenthook/discussions/categories/q-a)
- 💡 **Feature ideas & requests** →
  [Discussions › Ideas](https://github.com/Jesuso/agenthook/discussions/categories/ideas)
- 🐛 **Something's broken** →
  [open a bug report](https://github.com/Jesuso/agenthook/issues/new/choose)
- 🔒 **A security vulnerability** →
  **don't** open a public issue — follow [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)
- 📖 **Docs** →
  [getting started](../docs/getting-started.md) ·
  [Asana setup](../docs/asana-setup.md) · [Jira setup](../docs/jira-setup.md) ·
  [troubleshooting](../docs/troubleshooting.md)

Please don't use the issue tracker for general questions — Discussions is the place for those.
Issues are for actionable, reproducible bugs.
